content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty flat with mixed sector action — Metals and Energy leading, PSU Banks and Realty weak. India VIX cooling (-4.8%) is supportive but book is already 60% deployed with multiple positions near SL. Focus must be on managing existing book (trailing SLs on winners, assessing losers) rather than adding new exposure.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 76.50,
      "new_target": 85.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op skipped — keeping current SL/target. Strong Q4 results (+35% PAT), bullish sector. Stock above SMA20/50 and bouncing off support 76.95. Thesis intact despite 3.8% drawdown. HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +6.6% — protecting gains. Tightening SL from 1032.38 to 1035 (just above) to lock in ~5% gain. Strong Q4 (PAT +18.3%, GNPA <1%), stock holding VWAP 1049 well. Risk-reward still 1:1 from here but locking gains is priority."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Down 1.3%, holding above SMA20 (122.12). Still useful hedge given geopolitical risk. SL at 119 is appropriate — no change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Trailing SL up from 1413 to 1418 (above entry 1412.94 = breakeven+) since stock at 52-week high 1437 with strong Q4 (PAT +27%, revenue +22.6%). Locks in small gain while letting winner run toward 1465 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results in 2 days (Apr 30) — binary event. Stock down 2.5%, holding just above SL 2295 and S1 2316. Cannot tighten SL meaningfully without getting stopped on volatility. HOLD into results; if Nestle read-through positive HUL should follow."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "No-op — keeping SL at 406 (above entry 404.50). Stock near 52w high 414.40, bullish setup. HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1775.00,
      "new_target": 1920.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op — keeping SL. Stock down 2.4% but bounced off intraday low 1755 and made new 52w high 1816 today before fade. Power sector strength intact, Nabha catalyst pending. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Trailing SL up from 1720 to 1735 (above entry 1734) since stock +1.1% with 5.3x volume on Organon acquisition catalyst. Locks in breakeven on a position with debt-financing overhang. Lets winner run to target 1830."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Down 0.6%, SL at 318 just below CMP 319.95. Tightening further risks immediate stop-out on intraday noise. Defensive transmission play, near 52w high. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY LIMIT 23.65 already in book — not stacking. Letting it work or expire."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY LIMIT 612 already in book — not stacking."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY LIMIT 443 already in book — not stacking. Also note power-sector cluster already significant in book (NTPC, TORNTPOWER, POWERGRID); if filled, no additional power adds."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 76.50,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4, bullish sector momentum, holding above key MAs. SL 76.50 below S2 76.95 gives room. Thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL to 1035 (locks ~5% gain). Position best performer at +6.6%; protect on financial sector weakness."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, still above SMA20. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "reasoning": "At 52w high with strongest FMCG Q4 print. SL to 1418 locks in small gain above entry."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2295.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 in 2 days — binary event. Cannot tighten without stop-out risk. Hold through results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry. Stock near 52w high. Let it run to target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1775.00,
      "reasoning": "SL appropriate after intraday volatility (range 1755-1816). Power sector momentum intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to breakeven+1 on Organon catalyst momentum and 5.3x volume."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 318.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at 318 already protective. Defensive name into Q4 results May 19."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "TRENT, RRKABEL, COALINDIA, ULTRACEMCO worth watching but pre-results (Apr 30 for several) — wait for prints. NTPCGREEN red-flagged given Q3 PAT crash. INDUSTOWER bearish (Jefferies downgrade, no buyback). RELIANCE muted post-results. Will reassess after Apr 30 earnings cluster.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 60% deployed with 3 pending BUY orders that could push to 75-80% if filled. Per deployment hysteresis rule, default disposition for new entries is NO_ACTION. Power-sector cluster (NTPC + TORNTPOWER + POWERGRID + pending TATAPOWER) is already concentrated — if TATAPOWER fills, must reassess sector cap. Multiple Q4 results landing Apr 30 (HUL, RRKABEL, INDUSTOWER) — significant binary risk in book. Focus today is locking gains on PNBHOUSING, NESTLEIND, SUNPHARMA via trailing SLs."
}
